    BaseBlack.BlackInformation
    The BlackInformation class is used to store and manage information about specific player-related items and locations within the game.
    BaseBlack.BlackInformation.BlackMenu
    Represents a custom inventory implementation for managing "Black Locations".
    BaseBlue
    The BaseBlue class represents a derived implementation of the Base_Soul class providing specific functionality related to abilities, descriptions, and interactions for a particular type of resource or ability container.
